text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! 🎉 You've been approved as a Moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — feel free to introduce yourself and reach out if you need anything!
Welcome to the community, guide_sam! 🎉 You've been approved as an Event Helper. We're excited to have you with us — jump in, introduce yourself, and let us know if you have any questions!
Welcome to the community, mentor_lina! 🎉 You've been approved as a Mentor. We're so glad to have you here — please introduce yourself and don't hesitate to reach out if you need anything!
